description: Complete Solana on-chain DeFi data layer for AI agents - paid per call in USDC via x402.
name: io.github.gra-kir/solsigs-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base58 Solana private key of the AGENT'S OWN spending wallet (funded with USDC to pay per call). This is the consumer's key, never a SolSigs key.
environmentVariables.name: SOLSIGS_MCP_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint. Defaults to public mainnet.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: SolSigs API base URL. Defaults to https://solsigs.com.
environmentVariables.name: SOLSIGS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio or sse. Defaults to stdio.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

title: SolSigs
